=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/schemaSyncInEffect_preview.ts(11,10): warning TS377037: `Schema.decodeSync` is used inside an Effect generator. `Schema.decode` preserves the typed Effect error channel for this operation without throwing. effect(schemaSyncInEffect)


==== /.src/schemaSyncInEffect_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics schemaSyncInEffect:warning
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"
    
    const Person = Schema.Struct({ name: Schema.String, age: Schema.Finite })
    
    export const preview = Effect.gen(function*() {
      const input = yield* Effect.succeed({ name: "Ada", age: 1 })
      return Schema.decodeSync(Person)(input)
             ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377037: `Schema.decodeSync` is used inside an Effect generator. `Schema.decode` preserves the typed Effect error channel for this operation without throwing. effect(schemaSyncInEffect)
    })
